prices.source_phrase: Active Duty: Throughout the school year, receive half-off admission for active military personnel and up to 5 family members; during the summer (Armed Forces Day through Labor Day) receive FREE Admission for active military personnel and up to 5 family members through the Blue Star Museum Program.
prices.source_block:
Military Discounts

Active Duty: Throughout the school year, receive half-off admission for active military personnel and up to 5 family members; during the summer (Armed Forces Day through Labor Day) receive FREE Admission for active military personnel and up to 5 family members through the Blue Star Museum Program. Must present a military ID upon check-in.

Veterans: Half-off admission year-round for Veterans and up to 5 family members. Must present a veteran ID upon check-in (includes driver’s license with veteran designation).

reservation.source_phrase: Advanced ticket reservations recommended— including Members! We cannot admit walk-ins if we reach full capacity.
reservation.source_block:
Tickets/Reservations

Advanced ticket reservations recommended— including Members! We cannot admit walk-ins if we reach full capacity.

Museum Members are always free. Please remember to show your digital Membership card or a photo ID at the museum.

We close the museum between play sessions to clean. Your reservation is good for 1 session.

visitor_eligibility.source_phrase: The Museum prohibits any adult who is not accompanied by a child from visiting during public operating hours, unless that person has received express authorization to do so from the Museum.
visitor_eligibility.source_block:
Adults Without Children:

The Museum prohibits any adult who is not accompanied by a child from visiting during public operating hours, unless that person has received express authorization to do so from the Museum. If you’re interested in touring the Museum, please email us at [email protected] .
